title: better tech
description: adds alot of cool tech mods to make your minecraft experience as advanced as possible!
body:
Adds ALOT of tech mods to make your survival experience as advanced as possible!

it adds cool mods like security craft and avaritia

<details>
<summary>coolest mod features</summary>

go to space with ad astra!

and why not look at your bases while you're up there with securitycraft!

are netherite tools not enough? craft the  insane tools with avaritia!

explore alexs very dangerous caves!

and shoot the monsters in the caves with timeless and classics guns!

you want to fly, but don't want to go to space? use immersive aircrafts!

and alot more! 

</details>


<details>
<summary>how to install modpacks?</summary>

 this is a prism launcher/multimc  guide

 <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VE--Klt4keQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>



did you ever want to play minecraft as advanced as possible? ever thought vanilla was too simple? then this modpack is for you! you can go to space, build ultra secure bases, explore insane caves! the zombies will never enter your base again! you can also use planes to fly over build height! do you want to get ultra op tools so you can never be killed again? try avaritia!




I made this modpack due to most tech modpacks don't include securitycraft, which is my favorite tech mod!


the modpack will be updated more, so if your favourite mod isn't in here, just wait! if it's for 1.20.1 neoforge, it should be added very soon!
